title: Markos #3138
definition:
Mark = "a defense"

 1) an evangelist, the author of the Gospel of Mark. Marcus was his
    Latin surname, his Jewish name was John. He was a cousin of
    Barnabas and a companion of Paul in some of his missionary journeys
